items.headline: टी-20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026: न्यूज़ीलैंड ने अफ़ग़ानिस्तान को 5 विकेट से हराया
whyItMatters: इमेज स्रोत, RSS राष्ट्रीय स्वयंसेवक संघ (आरएसएस) के प्रमुख मोहन भागवत ने कहा है कि जब संघ कहेगा, वे अपनी ज़िम्मेदारी से मुक्त हो जाएंगे. हालांकि, उन्होंने कहा कि इसके बाद भी काम करने से मुक्ति नहीं हो
summaryParagraphs: इमेज स्रोत, RSS राष्ट्रीय स्वयंसेवक संघ (आरएसएस) के प्रमुख मोहन भागवत ने कहा है कि जब संघ कहेगा, वे अपनी ज़िम्मेदारी से मुक्त हो जाएंगे. हालांकि, उन्होंने कहा कि इसके बाद भी काम करने से मुक्ति नहीं होगी. आरएसएस शताब्दी समारोह के मौक़े पर आयोजित एक कार्यक्रम में भागवत ने रविवार को कहा कि 'हम आमतौर पर ऐसा सोचते हैं कि 75 की उम्र के बाद बिना दायित्व के कार्य करना चाहिए. इसको संघ की अनुमति मिलेगी तब होगा, जैसे मेरी बात है, मेरी उम्र 75 हो गई.' उन्होंने कहा, "मैंने कार्यकर्ताओं से कहा कि अब हो गया. इस पर उन्होंने मुझसे कहा कि 'आपको क्या हुआ है, आप घूम रहे हैं, और काम करो.' इसलिए मैं रुक गया हूं." भागवत ने आगे कहा, "मैं यहां रहूं ये मेरी इच्छा नहीं है, मैं यहां न रहूं ये भी मेरी इच्छा नहीं है. यह संघ का ऑप्शन है. जब संघ कहेगा, दायित्व से निवृत्ति होगी, कार्य से निवृत्ति नहीं होगी. दायित्व से निवृत्त होने के बाद भी जीवनभर काम चलता रहता है." आरएसएस प्रमुख मोहन भागवत सितंबर 2025 में 75 साल के हो गए हैं और वो अपने पद पर बने हुए हैं. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

summaryParagraphs: Pratyush Raj is a cricket journalist with TOI Sports, specializing in all things cricket, both on and off the field. He began his career with the Business Standard before following his passion as a sports reporter for the Times of India in Chandigarh. Pratyush has also contributed to the sports coverage of India Today Group and his last stint was with The Indian Express. His love for sports was nurtured during his upbringing in flood-prone Saharsa, a district in North Bihar, where Cricket Samrat was his constant companion. items.headline: Will Lewis Resigns As Washington Post CEO Following Massive Job Cuts
whyItMatters: This report focuses on the escalating political row in Assam ahead of the upcoming assembly elections. The Congress party has strongly criticised the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) following a controver
summaryParagraphs: This report focuses on the escalating political row in Assam ahead of the upcoming assembly elections. The Congress party has strongly criticised the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) following a controversial video involving Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma. The video, which has since been deleted by the BJP, reportedly showed the Chief Minister taking aim with Bangladeshi Muslims depicted as targets on the other side. Describing the footage as a 'fascist genocide vid', the Congress has questioned whether Prime Minister Narendra Modi will take action against such 'hate' and 'point-blank murder provocation'. The opposition further alleged that the BJP is spreading hate and provoking mass genocide in a highly polarised scenario. The programme highlights the intensifying poll battle and the silence of the central leadership regarding repeated provocations against a specific community in the state. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: From flyers to faithfuls: Why IndiGo and Air India are racing to lock in loyal customers
whyItMatters: The Aviator’s Bar at Air India's Maharaja Lounge, Terminal 3, New Delhi airport. (Air India) Summary Loyalty in travel grows as a customer retention lever, prompting airlines like IndiGo and Air India
summaryParagraphs: The Aviator’s Bar at Air India's Maharaja Lounge, Terminal 3, New Delhi airport. (Air India) Summary Loyalty in travel grows as a customer retention lever, prompting airlines like IndiGo and Air India to double down on their rewards programmes. IndiGo's BluChip and Air India's integration of its Maharaja programme with Air India Express is increasingly seen vital for growth. Gift this article This is a Mint Premium article gifted to you. Subscribe to enjoy similar stories. Fifteen months after launch of its loyalty initiative, IndiGo counts 10 million people on its BluChip programme, bringing the Gurugram-based airline at par with Air India's frequent flyer scheme, as the country’s two largest airlines battle it out for more customers. InterGlobe Aviation-run IndiGo, which launched its BluChip programme in September 2024, flew 107 million passengers in calendar year 2025, data from India's aviation regulator show. Air India, which relaunched its loyalty programme in November 2024, has For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Elon Musk denies Starlink phone: CEO says no device in works
whyItMatters: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet busines
summaryParagraphs: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet business's expansion ahead of a potential IPO. Musk has previously expressed strong reluctance towards phone manufacturing.
